title: Terk
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''terk''' was a animal whose hide was used in the making of [[terratta]], a [[Toydarian/Legends|Toydarian]] dish.

*<!-- 2003-01-XX -->''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''
